translation: # Objects of type org.apache.commons.codec.net.QuotedPrintableCodec cannot be quoted-printable decoded
self.assertEqual(str(e), "The charset tnm5 is not supported.")
assert str(e) == "Objects of type object cannot be quoted-printable encoded"
assert isinstance(e, DecoderException), "Expected DecoderException, but got {}".format(type(e))
assert str(e) == "Objects of type QuotedPrintableCodec cannot be quoted-printable decoded", "Expected error message not found"
self.assertEqual(str(e), "The charset None is not supported.")
# Invalid URL encoding: not a valid digit (radix 16): 39
assert "Invalid URL encoding: not a valid digit (radix 16): 35" in str(e)
assert isinstance(e, Exception), "Expected Exception, but got {}".format(type(e))
